summary: Validated requested features against LOCAL workspace artifacts under /app/wc2026tracker. Route wiring, PlayerLink fallback logic, scorer-details handler contract, and build regression checks pass locally. Dynamic Top Scorers click-through could not be runtime-verified via local UI because scorer links were not rendered (no live scorer data surfaced in this environment).

integration_issues.issue: Local Playwright run found 0 [data-testid^='scorer-goals-link-'] elements at runtime due missing scorer data, so runtime click path was not exercised end-to-end.

action_items: If E1 needs full runtime e2e proof for goals-click flow, provide deterministic scorer seed/mock data in local runtime and rerun UI automation.
Optionally rerun public preview validation after deployment sync; this run intentionally prioritized LOCAL workspace artifacts per request.
critical_code_review_comments: Local source is consistent with requested implementation: /player-id/:id and /scorers/:team/:player are present in App routes.
LiveMatchPanel timeline normalization includes playerId and PlayerLink correctly prefers /player-id route with /player fallback.
TopScorers renders goals as Link to scorer-details route with data-testid, and ScorerGoalDetails renders required opponent/minute/matchDate/goalType fields.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Local tests executed in /app/wc2026tracker. Added deterministic local handler test with MOCKED fetch to validate scorer-details response contract including goals[].playerId/opponent/minute/matchDate/goalType. Local Playwright confirmed /player-id route renders, but scorer goals links were absent at runtime due no scorer data; provide seeded scorer payload to complete runtime click e2e.
rca of the issue: No product logic regression reproduced in local source. Remaining gap is runtime data availability for scorer list in local UI, not code path absence. Repro: open http://127.0.0.1:3000/#/scorers, count [data-testid^='scorer-goals-link-'] => 0. Mitigation: run with valid STATS_API_KEY/REDIS_URL or seeded scorer fixture, then rerun UI e2e click verification. MOCKED APIs: YES (unit-level handler test mocked outbound TheStatsAPI fetch only).
